blocks.label: Dock Shelters

variables.label: Shelter type
variables.altText: Offer alternative shelter type with weather resistance and price.

blocks.label: Dock Shelter Accessories
Standards
blocks.text:
All products shall comply with at minimum:

- EN 12642 (load securing — dock equipment compatibility)
- Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC (where powered or mechanically operated components are included)
- Fire class of fabric per EN 13501-1 — The Supplier SHALL state the fire class of all fabric components

The Supplier shall provide test data demonstrating weather resistance performance.

Attach: data sheets, fabric specification and fire class per EN 13501-1, weather resistance test data, compatibility confirmation with overhead door and dock leveller.

overrides.ch5_priceBreakdownItems:
Per piece dock shelter — complete unit including:
- Frame, fabric cushions/curtains, fixings
- Guide rails (if included)
- Dock light (if included)
- Signage

Per piece accessories (itemised separately where applicable)
Transport: per delivery

Validity: minimum {{validityDays}} days.
State if prices subject to material index.

Payment: {{paymentDays}} days after invoice.

Surcharges not stated are deemed included and cannot be invoiced separately.
overrides.ch5_surchargeItems:
- Non-standard clear opening dimensions (outside standard production range)
- Replacement cover sets (fabric only, without frame)
overrides.ch6_exclusionItems:
Excluded (procured separately by STM):

- Installation and commissioning
- Steel substructure and wall backing frame
- Electrical supply (for powered dock lights)
- Builder's work
- Dock leveller
- Overhead door
- VAT

Supplier shall state additional exclusions. Items not listed and not excluded by Supplier are deemed included.

Installation instructions and documentation provided at no additional cost.
overrides.ch7_requiredDocuments:
Submit to {{stmContact}} at {{stmEmail}} before {{deadline}}.

Include:
1. Price schedule per unit
2. Data sheets per product
3. Fabric specification and fire class per EN 13501-1
4. Weather resistance test data
5. Compatibility confirmation with overhead door and dock leveller
6. Lead time after order confirmation
7. Warranty statement
8. General terms and conditions
9. All deviations and assumptions with justification

Incomplete quotations may be rejected.
STM is not obligated to award to lowest bidder.
This RFQ does not constitute a commitment to order.
